race.comment: EXCENIA (3) brings Victorian formlines to the table and should find this assignment more to her liking. Gets 1.5kg off with the claim and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Goes on top. SAPPHIRE REIGN (7) finally shed the maiden tag last time out and will have derived a stack of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Looms as the main danger. UNFAITHFUL (8) is a bit hit or miss but boasts a win over this course and distance and should get a cosy run in transit from gate four. Include in calculations. DREAMWRITER (9) hit the frame when having the first run for the new stable and will have come on from that hit-out. In the mix. KILONOVA (4) best of the rest while fresh.
